items.title: My daughter finally got a laptop which helped her to become a software engineer, Thanks to Dānam!
items.subtitle: As a parent, nothing brings greater joy than seeing our children pursue their passions and achieve her

items.title: Dānam helped us find books for school and my son regained confidence in his studies.
items.subtitle: Support from generous donors gave us hope and made daily learning possible again.

items.title: We received essential supplies quickly and could focus on rebuilding our family life.
items.subtitle: This platform connected us with kind people who truly cared about our needs.

items.title: Transparency
items.subtitle: Clear & honest communication ensures your donations are used as intended.

items.title: Community
items.subtitle: Dānam brings contributors & seekers together, by creating supportive network to benefit society.

items.title: Fairness
items.subtitle: We uphold an equal and fair process so every genuine need gets a chance.
